payload.label: refrigerator
payload.long_description: Full-height stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with reflective, slightly dented/smudged finish, vertical black recessed handles and a black water/ice dispenser on the left door; small brand badge visible at the top-right; approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"refrigerator","short_description":"stainless steel side-by-side refrigerator","long_description":"Full-height stainless-steel side-by-side refrigerator with reflective, slightly dented/smudged finish, vertical black recessed handles and a black water/ice dispenser on the left door; small brand badge visible at the top-right; approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.","attributes":["stainless steel finish","reflective/mirrored surface","side-by-side double doors","black recessed vertical handles","built-in black water/ice dispenser (left)","visible dents/wave-like reflections","smudges/fingerprints","brand badge top-right"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.5}
